Every field in the PMBOK schema with type, PK/FK, defaults, description

How identifiers and records flow between PMBOK and DM
Which fields/entities support which compliance frames
snake_case ending in _at; type TIMESTAMPTZ; default now() where applicable
ends in _flag (e.g. phi_flag) or _verified, default FALSE
PostgreSQL ENUM type; valid values listed on Enumerations sheets
JSONB for arrays/objects (audit before/after, multi-select stores)
Zero or many children per parent
FK pointing back to same table (e.g. wbs_element.parent_wbs_element_id)
Deleting parent deletes children (used for owned/composed data)
Parent cannot be deleted while children exist (used for reference data)
Child FK cleared on parent delete (used for optional links)
PMBOK schema holds project work; DM schema holds documents that describe and govern that work.
PMBOK changes per project; DM is enterprise-wide and changes slowly. Different audit, retention, and access patterns.
intake_id and doc_id are the two identifiers that flow between schemas — see Cross_Schema_References sheet.
